skills.name: Embowel
skills.description: Release a powerful stab into an enemy, then kick it away with your foot.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Reduces the damage received while using [Embowel] by 50%
Immunity against status ailments for 1 sec while using [Embowel]

skills.name: Stomping Kick
skills.description: Trample down on an enemy while in the air or jumping.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Max. level 1

skills.name: Warcry
skills.description: Temporarily weaken the nearby enemies to decrease the Attack of the physical attack from the caster. (excludes Magic, Missile attack)
skills.effect_text:
Targets: 10
Decreases Enemy's Physical Attack by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Frenzy
skills.effect_text:
Increases damage by CaptionRatio3 % per stack
Increases damage received by 0.5% per stack
Maximum Stacks: CaptionRatio2 hits
Basic Attack Speed: + CaptionRatio

skills.name: Pouncing
skills.description: Charge forward while slashing, attacking any enemies that block your way. The cycle of strike decreases by 20% when the equipped weapon in the main slot is a One-handed weapon and Dagger. Critical Chance increases at least by 30% when the equipped weapon in the main slot is a Two-handed weapon.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3 per 0.3 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Max. Duration: 3.5 seconds

skills.name: Seism
skills.description: Create an earth tremor to stop enemies from attacking. The enemy has a chance to become afflicted with [Stun].
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x CaptionRatio2 hits
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Embowel] deals additional 50% damage when used within 5 seconds of using [Seism]

attributes.name: Embowel: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Embowel] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Frenzy : Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Frenzy]'s damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Warcry: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the decrease Attack effect of [Warcry] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Stomping Kick] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

* Increases the skill factor of [Pouncing] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Seism: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Seism] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Leather Mastery: Animal Instinct
attributes.description:
* When equipped with 4 pieces of [Leather] armor, increases the final damage.

* Final damage increases by [Level of Arts x 1%]

* Cannot be activated with [Arts] Plate Mastery: Divine

attributes.name: [Arts] Embowel: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Embowel] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Pouncing: Trance
attributes.description:
* Unable to move under [Pouncing], but attack range doubles

* Increases SP consumption by 100%
